agent_summary: Customer reports: "Payment of 2000 taka failed but money was deducted" Classified as payment_failed. Evidence cross-checked against Transaction TXN-3001.
recommended_next_action: Verify the customer's claim against the matched transaction and escalate to a human dispute specialist before any resolution step.
customer_reply: Thank you for contacting us about your concern (reference TXN-3001). Based on the records we can see, the transaction in question does not match the details you described. We will have a specialist verify the records and reach out to you through our official in-app support channel or hotline within one business day.
